title: DivisionMC Modpack
description: Official modpack of DivisionMC, containing essential UI and performance mods that all PvPers will find useful!
body:
# Official modpack of DivisionMC
Contains essential UI and performance mods that all PvPers will find useful! Additionally includes support for most resource packs, shaders, a minimap and world map, and Flashback for recording! Comes with emissive textures for many vanilla blocks and mobs by default. Complimentary Reimagined shaders are recommended!

Join us by connecting to divisionmc.com or join our Discord at https://discord.gg/divisionmc
